mechanics.excerpt: Clan Steel viper suffered the most humiliating fate the invading Clans next t0 the shattered Smoke Jaguars_ Thinking to take advantage Jade Falcon weakness the attermath of the Refusal War; the Vipers challenged Falcon dom: inance of their shared occupation zone After their campaign of conquest failed the Vipers eft the Inner Sphere rather than be destroyed by the Falcons As the man who defeated the mosc fearsome threat the Inner Sphere had ever known Victor Steiner-Davion should have been the hero of the hour. In the eyes of many; he was but his Uwm people were not among them.
